creator: ray@bellis.me.uk
text:
FWIW, I'm seeing very similar crashes on just one of our Dell R330s running 14.2-p1:

(kgdb) where
#0  __curthread () at /usr/src/sys/amd64/include/pcpu_aux.h:57
#1  doadump (textdump=<optimized out>) at /usr/src/sys/kern/kern_shutdown.c:405
#2  0xffffffff80b3d7a7 in kern_reboot (howto=260) at /usr/src/sys/kern/kern_shutdown.c:523
#3  0xffffffff80b3dc7e in vpanic (fmt=0xffffffff8117705f "%s", ap=ap@entry=0xfffffe00c616bd00) at /usr/src/sys/kern/kern_shutdown.c:967
#4  0xffffffff80b3dad3 in panic (fmt=<unavailable>) at /usr/src/sys/kern/kern_shutdown.c:891
#5  0xffffffff81025a0b in trap_fatal (frame=0xfffffe00c616bde0, eva=8589935897) at /usr/src/sys/amd64/amd64/trap.c:952
#6  0xffffffff81025a56 in trap_pfault (frame=<unavailable>, usermode=false, signo=<optimized out>, ucode=<optimized out>) at /usr/src/sys/amd64/amd64/trap.c:760
#7  <signal handler called>
#8  0xffffffff821410f6 in ipmi_complete_request (sc=sc@entry=0xfffff80003c99000, req=req@entry=0xffffffff823b9e80) at /usr/src/sys/dev/ipmi/ipmi.c:560
#9  0xffffffff8214400b in kcs_loop (arg=arg@entry=0xfffff80003c99000) at /usr/src/sys/dev/ipmi/ipmi_kcs.c:477
#10 0xffffffff80af760f in fork_exit (callout=0xffffffff82143f70 <kcs_loop>, arg=0xfffff80003c99000, frame=0xfffffe00c616bf40) at /usr/src/sys/kern/kern_fork.c:1164
#11 <signal handler called>
#12 0x006e006f004e0020 in ?? ()
